command_display: lms chat google/gemma-4-e2b --system-prompt You generate one static product UI candidate for a JudgmentKit comparison fixture. Return one valid JSON object only. Do not use Markdown fences. Do not include scripts, external assets, remote fonts, or external image URLs. Respect the context boundary described in the user prompt. --prompt <prompt> --ttl 300 --yes
notes: Gemma 4 (local LLM) output captured through lms for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix. Compatibility alias for the previous six-artifact matrix URL.

parsed.summary: The workspace informs the user that evidence is missing and offers options to submit additional files or proceed to a handoff.
parsed.html:
Refund Review Workspace

Evidence Status

The required receipt photo is missing.

Decision Path

Handoff

Send the case to a support agent for manual review.
